query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM claims) as total_claims,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_assessments) as total_ai_assessments,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM claims WHERE ai_assessment_triggered = 1) as claims_with_ai_triggered;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM claims) as total_claims,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_assessments) as total_ai_assessments,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM claims WHERE ai_assessment_triggered = 1) as claims_with_ai_triggered;
